archetype.rationale: Colombian restaurant where foot traffic, neighborhood identity, and the dining atmosphere are the primary draw. Customers come for the authentic experience of feeling like they are in Colombia.

primary.usage: Main CTA buttons, accent highlights, button backgrounds

secondary.usage: Links, secondary accents, vivid cyan-blue highlights

accent.usage: Red accent links on second-floor venue page, urgency CTAs

main.usage: Page background — body default is white per Divi theme base CSS

alternate.usage: Alternating sections, light gray background panels

gradients.usage: Hero image overlay for text readability

colorPalette.overallTheme: Warm-vibrant with white base — CSS evidence: Divi theme body background defaults to #FFFFFF, sections alternate between white and light gray (#F7F7F7). Yellow (#FBF800) buttons and blue (#2EA3F2) links provide Latin-inspired vibrancy. The dark background (#1A1A1A) is only used in footer and hero overlay, not as the dominant theme. bgMain source: body default background-color: #FFFFFF in Divi theme base stylesheet.

headingFont.style: modern, clean, slightly rounded — used for selected headings at weight 300 for elegance

bodyFont.style: clean, highly readable — the default body font per CSS font-family: Open Sans, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px

messagingPatterns.headlines: Bold cultural pride statements — 'The best Colombian Restaurant & Bar in Toronto'
messagingPatterns.ctas: Direct invitations — 'Reserve Now', 'Order Online', 'Explore Our Menu'
messagingPatterns.descriptions: Benefit-focused with cultural authenticity — emphasizing real Colombian flavors and atmosphere

instagram.tone: Warm, proud, community-focused — celebrating Colombian culture
sampleCaptions: Lo mejor de la comida colombiana lo tenemos aqui!
Authentic homemade Colombian food in the heart of Toronto
Live music, great food, and the best Latin atmosphere in North York

commonPraise: The food is incredibly delicious and authentically Colombian
Big portions and amazing value for money
Feels like you are eating in Colombia
Friendly staff with Latin American hospitality

contentStrategy.valueProposition: The most authentic Colombian dining experience in Toronto — real recipes from Cali brought to North York by celebrated chef Diana Arizala
keyMessages: Authentic Colombian cuisine made by a celebrated chef from Cali
Live music and events create a vibrant Latin atmosphere
A community hub for Colombians and Latin culture lovers in Toronto

imageStrategy.mood: bright and warm with Latin vibrancy
imageStrategy.composition: close-ups of dishes and wide shots of the dining space

food.description: Restaurant interior and food spread — BlogTO feature photo
Colombian dish close-up from BlogTO feature
Bandeja paisa platter — Colombia's national dish

atmosphere.description: Restaurant storefront or interior wide shot

people.name: Diana Patricia Arizala
people.bio: Celebrated Colombian chef from Cali, Colombia. Arrived in Canada with her four children and a dream to conquer Canada. After living in Winnipeg, she moved to Toronto and opened Esto es Colombia in 2016. She has been cooking her entire life and her passion is sharing authentic Colombian cuisine with the world.

reviews.author: David Orozco
reviews.text: A little taste of Colombia here in North York! We had empanadas followed by the bandeja paisa which massive and absolutely delicious!

reviews.author: Carlos Castro
reviews.text: I love the atmosphere like if you were in a restaurant in Medellin, Cartagena or Bogota, service is phenomenal and the food so good.

reviews.author: Paola Vela Duarte
reviews.text: The best Colombian restaurant that I've tried moment in Toronto. Place: clean, warm space where you remember things of your country.

reviews.author: Jonathan Prias
reviews.text: It's a nice spot with plenty of Colombian options. The portions are generous, and the food is good, though not outstanding in my opinion.

reviews.author: BlogTO Editorial
reviews.text: Toronto's Colombian community's go-to place for authentic and honest plates. You feel like you're in Colombia here.

reviews.author: Multiple Reviewers
reviews.text: The food is incredibly delicious and authentically Colombian with big portions and amazing value for money. Seafood dishes filled with high-quality seafood. Staff are friendly with Latin American hospitality.
